Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 17 

ADMSN_HR 

LABEL: Admission Hour 

DESCRIPTION: The time (hour) of admission to the hospital. 

SHORT NAME: ADMSN_HR 

LONG NAME: ADMSN_HR 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 
LT header 

VALUES: 00 = 0:00–0:59 
01 = 1:00–1:59 
02 = 2:00–2:59 
03 = 3:00–3:59 
04 = 4:00–4:59 
05 = 5:00–5:59 
06 = 6:00–6:59 
07 = 7:00–7:59 
08 =
